allow: PowerShell(python -c "import json; from graphify.detect import detect; from pathlib import Path; result = detect\(Path\('.'\)\); open\('.graphify_detect.json','w'\).write\(json.dumps\(result\)\)"; python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('.graphify_detect.json'\)\); print\('total_files',d.get\('total_files'\)\); print\('total_words',d.get\('total_words'\)\); print\('skipped_sensitive',len\(d.get\('skipped_sensitive',[]\)\)\); [print\(k,len\(v\)\) for k,v in d.get\('files',{}\).items\(\)]")

PowerShell(python -c "import json; from graphify.detect import detect_incremental; from pathlib import Path; result = detect_incremental\(Path\('.'\)\); Path\('.graphify_incremental.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\(result\)\); print\('new_total=', result.get\('new_total', 0\)\); print\('files keys:', list\(result.get\('new_files',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
